title: Savory Mediterranean Garlic Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring a blend of salty, crisp flavors with the addition of garlic for an extra savory touch.
instructions: Blanch green beans in boiling water for about 2 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté until fragrant, approximately 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Add red bell pepper and tomatoes, cook for another 5-7 minutes until softened slightly and heated through.
Stir in green beans and basil leaves. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes mixing well.
Season with paprika powder if using. Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
